faqs.question: What qualifies as a pest control emergency in Bayonne?
faqs.answer: A pest emergency includes situations requiring immediate attention such as large rodent infestations, active wasp or hornet nests threatening safety, widespread bed bug outbreaks, or sudden cockroach invasions. We also respond to pest issues that pose health risks or threaten business operations in Bayonne.
